title: lonchocarpus phlebophyllus
intro: Lonchocarpus phlebophyllus, also known as the "Palmillo" or "False Patawa", is a plant species native to Central America and the Caribbean. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation, lower blood pressure, and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Lonchocarpus phlebophyllus include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine in the regions where it is found.
